clips.status: ALL CLIPS SOURCED. VLM verified first frames. Some clips' first frames don't match intended purpose — Editor should scrub through later frames to find the right moment, or use clips as context if the specific moment isn't found.
clips.law_1_note: VLM only checked first frame. The Editor (next agent) will scrub through each clip to find the best moment. If a clip genuinely doesn't contain the needed content, the Editor will flag it.

clip-001.note: Mbappé in France jersey #10 on field with crowd. Correct.

clip-002.note: Mbappé in white PSG jersey #7, focused expression. Correct.

clip-003.note: Wide shot of 2018 World Cup Final pitch with players in action. Correct.

clip-004.note: Mbappé in France jersey with captain's armband, serious expression. Correct.

clip-005.note: First frame shows blurred player in yellow jersey. May not be PSG UCL failure. FLAG: Editor should check later frames or this clip may be mislabeled. Duration only 10s — shortest of all clips.

clip-006.note: Mbappé in white Real Madrid jersey on ground near ball, Liverpool player nearby. Correct — shows struggle.

clip-007.note: Wide shot of France match with players including #10. Correct — shows team context.

clip-008.note: First frame shows match with score 'FRA 1-0 SWE' and players celebrating. This is a France match but doesn't clearly show Deschamps. FLAG: Editor should look for Deschamps in later frames, or this may be match footage not sideline footage.

clip-009.note: First frame shows player in gray PSG training kit running near goal. Doesn't clearly show the MNM trio together. FLAG: Editor should check later frames for Neymar/Messi, or use as PSG training context.

clip-010.note: First frame shows Mbappé in Real Madrid match with 'MBAPPE' text. Doesn't clearly show Vinícius overlap. FLAG: Editor should check later frames for the tactical overlap moment.

clip-011.note: Real Madrid player (likely Bellingham) in a match. Partially matches — need to verify it's Bellingham and shows him dropping deep.

clip-012.note: Real Madrid players in defensive phase. Partially matches — need to verify Mbappé is visible and not pressing. Note: low resolution (668x480).

clip-013.note: PSG manager Tuchel on the bench. Correct.

clip-014.note: Real Madrid manager Ancelotti at tactical board. Correct.

clip-015.note: France team huddle with flags. Correct — shows unity.

clip-016.note: First frame shows Mbappé in France kit holding a ball. Doesn't show 'determined' expression clearly. FLAG: Editor should check later frames for a more determined/portrait moment, or use as France context.
